# 🌅 Morning Digest — Monday, April 27, 2026

No emails from priority senders (Danny Miller, Jessica Kim, Eugenia Barragan, Larry Marioth, Raquel Trujillo-Oria, Chelsea Schinnour) in this window. Note: Eugenia Barragan and Danny Miller are both attendees at your Sprint #10 Planning meeting this afternoon.

## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations

**Team Sprint/Project channel:** Active discussion yesterday. Jean Garcia announced a likely move from Asana to Smartsheet "pretty soon" — heads up for planning. Mar Garcia updated: TRACE pushed to Sprint #11, Court EAD/I-90/DACA are with IT awaiting response, Approval Copy of Camilo moved to CoE. You flagged your own timelines: Dashboards delayed to Thursday for hypercare, Scams expected to close this week, U-AOS pushed 3+ weeks pending Dana. Two projects flagged as "at risk" for IT Capacity.

**Santiago + Jhara (1:1):** Check-in on a shared codebase/tool — Jhara hasn't started yet but plans to pick it up today. She confirmed there are no advances you need to worry about; you can work on the main branch without conflict.

**Paralegal Dashboard thread:** You delivered the paralegal dashboard to Jess and confirmed it's live. Alan Soto acknowledged the report fixes. ✅ Closed loop.

**GitHub token discussion (meeting chat):** Brief exchange about GitHub PAT expiration policy — security guidance confirmed 90-day tokens are best practice.

## ⚡ Immediate Action

**Scam Incident #253 requires immediate attention.** A client was successfully scammed out of **$7,500** — the scammer impersonated Lisinski Law Firm. This notification is unread and sits at the top of your inbox. Confirm the incident response protocol is in motion before your 9:00 AM meeting.
